approved_command_preview: Guard PR #296 at head 89279edc09caf4fefb7f47a3042367f81c60a44a; refine python_path_expr_info so Path(filename) / literal and Path(filename).joinpath(literal) are dynamic while Path(output_dir) / literal and Path(output_dir).joinpath(literal) remain literal negatives; repair the corrupted regression fixture; run regression selftest, pareto context selftest, py_compile, CodeQL workflow validation, and git diff --check; commit and push the PR branch only if validation passes.
command:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
if ($PSVersionTable.PSVersion.Major -ge 7) { $PSNativeCommandUseErrorActionPreference = $true }
$repo = $env:DCOIR_REPO_ROOT
$branch = 'fix/dcoir-review-path-write-sentinel-290'
$expectedHead = '89279edc09caf4fefb7f47a3042367f81c60a44a'
$worktree = Join-Path $env:RUNNER_TEMP 'pr296-path-info-regression-worktree'
if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $worktree) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $worktree -Recurse -Force }

git -C $repo fetch origin $branch
git -C $repo worktree add -B $branch $worktree "origin/$branch"
$actualHead = (git -C $worktree rev-parse HEAD).Trim()
if ($actualHead -ne $expectedHead) {
  throw "Expected PR branch head $expectedHead but found $actualHead. Refusing to patch stale branch."
}

git -C $worktree config user.name 'ChatGPT Exec'
git -C $worktree config user.email 'actions@github.com'

$patchScript = Join-Path $env:RUNNER_TEMP 'fix_pr296_path_info_regression.py'
@'
import sys
from pathlib import Path

root = Path(sys.argv[1])
source_path = root / "scripts" / "openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context.py"
regression_path = root / "scripts" / "openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py"

source = source_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
helper_anchor = '''def python_is_dynamic_path_segment(node: ast.AST) -> bool:
    if python_is_literal_path_segment(node):
        return False
    if isinstance(node, ast.Constant):
        return False
    return True


def python_is_path_constructor(node: ast.AST, path_constructor_names: set[str] | None = None) -> bool:
'''
helper_replacement = '''def python_is_dynamic_path_segment(node: ast.AST) -> bool:
    if python_is_literal_path_segment(node):
        return False
    if isinstance(node, ast.Constant):
        return False
    return True


def python_is_directory_base_path_name(name: str) -> bool:
    leaf = name.rsplit(".", 1)[-1].lower()
    return bool(re.search(r"(?:^|_)(?:base|dir|directory|folder|root|workspace|repo)(?:_|$)", leaf))


def python_single_arg_path_has_dynamic_write_segment(node: ast.AST) -> bool:
    if python_is_literal_path_segment(node):
        return False
    if isinstance(node, ast.Constant):
        return False
    target = python_target_key(node)
    if target and python_is_directory_base_path_name(target):
        return False
    return python_is_dynamic_path_segment(node)


def python_is_path_constructor(node: ast.AST, path_constructor_names: set[str] | None = None) -> bool:
'''
if helper_anchor not in source:
    raise SystemExit("source helper insertion anchor not found")
source = source.replace(helper_anchor, helper_replacement, 1)
old_path_info_return = "return True, python_is_dynamic_path_segment(arg)"
if old_path_info_return not in source:
    raise SystemExit("python_path_expr_info single-arg return anchor not found")
source = source.replace(old_path_info_return, "return True, python_single_arg_path_has_dynamic_write_segment(arg)", 1)
old_single_return = "return python_is_dynamic_path_segment(arg)"
if old_single_return not in source:
    raise SystemExit("python_single_dynamic_path_expr return anchor not found")
source = source.replace(old_single_return, "return python_single_arg_path_has_dynamic_write_segment(arg)", 1)
if source.count("python_single_arg_path_has_dynamic_write_segment") != 3:
    raise SystemExit("unexpected helper reference count after source patch")

regression = regression_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
bad = '''literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels = mod.detect_risk_senuls(
    """dif --git a/tools/safe_writer.py b/tools/safe_writer.py
index 0000000...1111111 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/safe_writer.py
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+def write_summary(note, output_dir):
+    destination = Path(output_dir / "summary.txt")>
+    destination.write_text(note, fandoding="utf-8")
"""
)
assert not any(item.label == mod.FILE_WRITE_PATH_LABEL for item in literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels)
'''
good = '''literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels = mod.detect_risk_sentinels(
    """diff --git a/tools/safe_writer.py b/tools/safe_writer.py
index 0000000..1111111 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tools/safe_writer.py
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+from pathlib import Path
+def write_summary(note, output_dir):
+    destination = Path(output_dir / "summary.txt")
+    destination.write_text(note, encoding="utf-8")
"""
)
assert not any(item.label == mod.FILE_WRITE_PATH_LABEL for item in literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels)
'''
if bad not in regression:
    raise SystemExit("expected corrupted literal_wrapped_path_expr_sentinels block not found")
regression = regression.replace(bad, good, 1)
markers = ["detect_risk_senuls", "fandoding", 'summary.txt")>', "dif --git", "0000000...1111111"]
remaining = [marker for marker in markers if marker in regression]
if remaining:
    raise SystemExit("corruption markers still present after replacement: " + repr(remaining))

with source_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="\n") as handle:
    handle.write(source)
with regression_path.open("w", encoding="utf-8", newline="\n") as handle:
    handle.write(regression)
print("patched python_path_expr_info single-arg handling and regression fixture")
'@ | Set-Content -LiteralPath $patchScript -Encoding UTF8

python $patchScript $worktree

Push-Location $worktree
try {
  python scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  python scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_selftest.py
  python -m py_compile scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_selftest.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  python scripts/validate-codeql-security-workflow.py
  git diff --check
  $status = git status --porcelain
  if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace(($status | Out-String))) {
    throw 'No file changes detected after path info and fixture repair.'
  }
  Write-Host 'Changed files before commit:'
  git status --short
  git diff -- scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  git add scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context.py scripts/openrouter_pr_review_pareto_context_regression_selftest.py
  git commit -m 'Fix single-argument path sentinel regression'
  $newHead = (git rev-parse HEAD).Trim()
  git push origin "HEAD:$branch"
  Write-Host "pushed_head=$newHead"
}
finally {
  Pop-Location
}

git -C $repo worktree remove $worktree --force
